message:
chore(beads): sync issue store — close 5 rch skill-mining bugs (bd-3ogaz, bd-5z2wa, bd-hke4t, bd-nhrjr, bd-nuuqt)

Flush local beads state after landing the five skill-mining-driven
improvements filed during the 2026-04-22 rch skill review run:

  * remote_compilation_helper-3ogaz (bd-3ogaz)
      Alert lifecycle with `cleared_pending_clean` state and
      cleared_retention so self-healing circuit-breaker warnings
      stop lingering on `rch status` — closed.

  * remote_compilation_helper-5z2wa (bd-5z2wa)
      Per-fleet cooperative lock for deploy/rollback/drain backed
      by an O_CREAT|O_EXCL pidfile with stale-PID sweep and
      RCH_FLEET_WAIT_SECS wait support — closed.

  * remote_compilation_helper-hke4t (bd-hke4t)
      `rch config validate` and `rch config doctor` now upgrade
      missing identity_file to RCH-E009, expand env vars via
      shellexpand::full, and aggregate shared-key diagnostics
      across workers — closed.

  * remote_compilation_helper-nhrjr (bd-nhrjr follow-up)
      Test coverage for the ssh_error_code helper and the probe
      summary deduplication — closed.

  * remote_compilation_helper-nuuqt (bd-nuuqt)
      `rch self-test --all` now enforces `--timeout` as a hard
      per-worker total budget (layered over the existing
      per-attempt timeout), prefixes timeout errors with
      [RCH-E203], and prints a classifying "N ok, N timed out,
      N failed." summary — closed.

Mechanical export via `br sync --flush-only`; the actual code
changes are the preceding five commits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
